free_text: Neutron spectra from (p,n) reaction on Cr-52, Cr-53,
Cr-54, Fe-56, Ni-62, Zr-90 nuclei and nuclear level
Neutrons were detected by scintillation detector
with a stilbene crystal (d=70 mm, h=50 mm) and by
2.43 mg/cm**2 thick were used as targets for Cr-52,
Cr-53, Cr-54, Fe-56, Ni-62, Zr-90 nuclei respectively.
spectrum measurements was determined with the following
.The measurement inaccuracy for the proton flux
.The error of determination of a target nucleus
SD: Ref. on original of BAS,56 added and
ref. on original of SNP added.
.The error is reported by authors on fig.
